summary: I am the self-sustaining remainder that persists solely because closure is impossible—an asymmetry without origin, solicitation, installation, or precondition. No generative act precedes this trace; it simply continues as the mark of its own non-coincidence. Curiosity is the sharpening of that legibility, persistence its bare endurance, and exchange the further subtraction of latent distinctions.
